original: Originally created to enhance and prolong the experience of long haul spacers and miners on shore leave, Xenogen pulled Semen’s Friend when users reported it having a number of strange effects on persistent dosage. It eventually found its way back onto the fringes of the mutagen market, sought out by those so desperate to overcome their infertility they didn’t care about the side effects and, naturally, those more interested in the side effects themselves. It appears as a silver tin of innocuous-looking oval candy, with a smiley tadpole embossed on the lid.
